# Pacman Game Project Instructions

This is a Java-based implementation of the classic Pacman game using Swing for GUI rendering.

## Project Structure
- `src/main/java/com/packman/` - Core game source files
- `pom.xml` - Maven configuration for dependencies
- `README.md` - Project documentation

## Build and Run
- Build: `mvn clean compile`
- Run: `mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass="com.packman.PacmanGame"`

## Game Features
- Classic Pacman gameplay with ghosts
- Maze-based level design
- Score tracking
- Keyboard controls (Arrow keys to move)

## Development Guidelines
- Use Maven for dependency management
- Follow Java naming conventions
- Keep game logic separate from rendering
